# Paper Overview {#paper-overview}

```{r paper-overview-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/paper-overview-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/paper-overview/"
)
```

```{r child-paper-overview, child="../lecture-content/01-paper-overview.Rmd"}
```
